content:
RORK â€” FINAL ENTERPRISE ACCEPTANCE AND RELEASE

STOP ALL NEW DEVELOPMENT.

Do not start new features.

This is the final production acceptance checklist.

The project is NOT complete until every item below is VERIFIED on the final Build 32 APK.

========================
PHASE 1 â€” OWNER LOGIN
========================

â–ˇ Cold launch opens correctly
â–ˇ No black screen
â–ˇ No infinite loading
â–ˇ No React errors
â–ˇ Correct owner account signs in
â–ˇ Red "This account is not the IVX owner" message disappears
â–ˇ Owner role resolves correctly
â–ˇ Session persists correctly
â–ˇ Logout works
â–ˇ Login again works
â–ˇ Force-close and reopen works

========================
PHASE 2 â€” OWNER CONTROL
========================

Verify live:

â–ˇ Owner AI
â–ˇ Control
â–ˇ Admin
â–ˇ Business Overview
â–ˇ Diagnostics
â–ˇ Revenue
â–ˇ Users
â–ˇ Members
â–ˇ Investors
â–ˇ Deals
â–ˇ Properties
â–ˇ Settings

No placeholder data.

========================
PHASE 3 â€” MODULE QA
========================

Verify:

â–ˇ Home
â–ˇ Members
â–ˇ Investors
â–ˇ Projects
â–ˇ Live Deals
â–ˇ Reels
â–ˇ Chat
â–ˇ Uploads
â–ˇ CRM
â–ˇ Admin
â–ˇ Landing Page
â–ˇ Notifications

Every module must:

â€˘ load live data
â€˘ not freeze
â€˘ not duplicate requests
â€˘ not show placeholder content
â€˘ recover correctly after refresh

========================
PHASE 4 â€” MEDIA
========================

Verify:

â–ˇ Reels autoplay
â–ˇ Upload video
â–ˇ Image upload
â–ˇ Progressive loading
â–ˇ Infinite scroll
â–ˇ Pagination
â–ˇ No flickering
â–ˇ No loading loops

========================
PHASE 5 â€” NETWORK
========================

Confirm production only.

No runtime calls to:

â–ˇ localhost
â–ˇ 127.0.0.1
â–ˇ 10.0.2.2
â–ˇ ngrok
â–ˇ localtunnel
â–ˇ rorktest.dev
â–ˇ development URLs

========================
PHASE 6 â€” DEPLOYMENT
========================

Return:

â€˘ GitHub commit SHA
â€˘ Render deployment ID
â€˘ Backend SHA
â€˘ APK SHA
â€˘ APK SHA-256
â€˘ /health result

All production SHAs must match.

========================
PHASE 7 â€” FINAL ACCEPTANCE
========================

Install Build 32 on a clean Android device.

Verify:

â–ˇ Owner Login PASS
â–ˇ Owner AI PASS
â–ˇ Admin PASS
â–ˇ Members PASS
â–ˇ Investors PASS
â–ˇ Projects PASS
â–ˇ Deals PASS
â–ˇ Reels PASS
â–ˇ Chat PASS
â–ˇ Uploads PASS
â–ˇ CRM PASS
â–ˇ Landing PASS
â–ˇ Notifications PASS

Record any failures with the exact screen, error message, and trace ID.

Only declare:

"IVX ENTERPRISE PRODUCTION VERIFIED"

when every item above passes on the physical Android device. If any check fails, report the blocker instead of marking the project complete.
